name: Verify accepted payment method icons are displayed in the footer

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
Then  I should see the payment icon with alt text "We accept Amex"
And  I should see the payment icon with alt text "We accept Visa"
And  I should see the payment icon with alt text "We accept Mastercard"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Verify accepted payment method icons are displayed in the footer

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Verify accepted payment method icons are displayed in the footer
